results.title: Simple Landing
results.error: At least one file must be provided. | At least one likely frontend entry file must exist. | Contract requires delivered files, but no valid files were found. | Contract requires an entrypoint deliverable, but no likely frontend entry file was found. | Contract requires an implementation-ready frontend, but the delivered files do not show clear frontend structure markers. | Contract entrypoint expectation was not satisfied by any delivered file. | Contract expects an HTML entry file, but none was delivered.

errors.message: At least one file must be provided.
At least one likely frontend entry file must exist.
Contract requires delivered files, but no valid files were found.
Contract requires an entrypoint deliverable, but no likely frontend entry file was found.
Contract requires an implementation-ready frontend, but the delivered files do not show clear frontend structure markers.
Contract entrypoint expectation was not satisfied by any delivered file.
Contract expects an HTML entry file, but none was delivered.
